title: Deep Delicious Moroccan Lamb Tangia
description: A spicy and silky Moroccan dish featuring lamb, golden caster sugar, and a blend of aromatic spices, cooked to perfection in a traditional tangia pot. This satvik-friendly recipe is a nostalgic and flavorful delight.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb pieces and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion, minced garlic, and grated ginger to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent.
Stir in the ground cumin, coriander, cayenne pepper, and salt.
Add the golden caster sugar and stir to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a traditional tangia pot or a large Dutch oven.
Cover the pot and cook over low heat for 2.5 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Serve the tangia hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro.
